title: Programs - BJJ Lab Zürich
text: HOW TO START? Home > Programs OUR PROGRAMS Jiu Jitsu can be an amazing experience for everyone. Whether you’re a beginner, intermediate, or advanced practitioner, our carefully designed curriculums will help you achieve your goals. KIDS PROGRAM BASIC COURSE FUNDAMENTALS ADVANCED JIU JITSU KIDS Prepare your kid for any challenge with our kids program. In a relaxed, playful and fun environment they will learn the techniques of Brazilian Jiu Jitsu, improve their fundamental movement skills and socialize with other kids. Check out our kids program guide for parents if you want to learn more. MORE DETAILS JIU JITSU BASIC COURSE In our five weeks basic course you will learn everything you need to know to get started with BJJ. No prior knowledge is required and you don’t have to be in shape to start your journey. New to BJJ? Check out our beginner guide. MORE DETAILS JIU JITSU FUNDAMENTALS In our fundamentals program you learn everything you need to know to go from white to blue belt.Our fundamentals curriculum is structured as a repeating 16 week program where we focus on a position for a whole week. MORE DETAILS JIU JITSU ADVANCED In this program you learn all the advanced positions and techniques from Brazilian Jiu Jitsu. These classes will take you from blue belt to purple belt and beyond. MORE DETAILS READY TO TRY JIU JITSU? Send us a message on Whatsapp or through our contact form to schedule your first class. We are happy to answer any questions and look forward to meeting you!
